title: CE-RISE Circular Economy CGE
description: Empirical circular-economy computable general equilibrium benchmark-construction workflow for CE-RISE value chains, implemented in Julia and structured for JCGE calibration.
notes: Pre-release repository state for the forthcoming v0.1.0 public release of the CE-RISE CGE benchmark-construction workflow, including disaggregation mappings, staged SUT artifacts, validation pipeline, and a closed benchmark SAM for calibration.
